prompt: Vertical composition of a serene sunlit garden scene: a young woman with long flowing black hair sits relaxed on a green metal bistro chair beneath a large tree, reading an open book in her lap. She wears an oversized white long-sleeve shirt, olive-green wide-leg trousers and white sneakers; her expression is peaceful and slightly smiling, absorbed in the book. A round metal table beside her holds a steaming cup of tea, a plate of mixed berries, and a small stack of books; a white cat lounges contentedly on the table. Background features a manicured lawn, a tall rose-covered hedge with abundant pale pink blooms, terracotta and ceramic potted plants, and a white stucco wall with an outdoor lantern. Soft dappled sunlight filters through leaves, casting gentle shadows on stone patio tiles. Colors: soft pastel palette with rose pinks, sage greens, warm golden light; mood calm and intimate. Render as high-detail digital painting blending semi-realistic and elegant anime-inspired style, soft brush textures, subtle grain, shallow depth of field, cinematic lighting, 3:4 vertical framing.
